creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
The situation got improved with introduction of the "direct" mode for libinotify-kqueue. See this commit upstream: https://invent.kde.org/frameworks/kcoreaddons/-/commit/9f00841883640daaa8961b9aaf0e309b757c1a69

In FreeBSD the fix is present since kf6-kcoreaddons-6.13.0

The underlying problem isn't solved yet, but let's close this PR in favor of more general https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=258010
